pages_crawled.title: Pricing - Endee
pages_crawled.meta_desc: Choose your Endee plan. Start free and scale as your AI applications grow.
pages_crawled.key_content: Choose Your Plan of Endee Serverless. Start free and scale as your AI applications grow. Explorer: Perfect for learning and prototyping — Coming Soon. Builder: For startups and growing teams — Coming Soon. Scale: For organizations at scale — Coming Soon. Begin with the Explorer tier and scale as your AI infrastructure needs grow.

pages_crawled.title: Contact - Endee
pages_crawled.meta_desc: Have questions about Endee? We'd love to hear from you.
pages_crawled.key_content: Have questions about Endee? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out and we'll respond as soon as possible. Email: contact@endee.io. Social: LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Discord. Address: 8th Floor, iSprout, Shilpitha Tech Park, Devarabisanahalli, Bellandur, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560103.

pages_crawled.title: Blog - Endee
pages_crawled.meta_desc: Insights on vector databases, AI infrastructure, and building production-grade ML systems.
pages_crawled.key_content: Insights on vector databases, AI infrastructure, and building production-grade ML systems. Blog posts: Speed vs. Accuracy: Balancing Precision in Vector Search; How Vector Databases Actually Work Internally; A Beginner-Friendly Guide to Understand Vectors; What is RAG?; What Is HNSW and Why Is It So Fast?; Dense vs Sparse Vectors; What Are Vector Embeddings?

product.name: Endee Vector Graph Engine (VGE)
product.tagline: High-performance vector database engineered for production AI systems
features: Sub-5ms Latency — Blazing fast query response times at any scale
Infinite Scale — Handle billions of vectors without performance degradation
100% Open Source — Fully open source under permissive license
Lightweight & Fast — Minimal memory footprint with maximum performance
Developer First — RESTful API with SDKs for Python, TypeScript, Go, and Java
Community Driven — Active community with regular updates

use_cases.name: AI Agents
use_cases.description: Vector databases give AI agents fast, reliable retrieval, enabling smarter reasoning and multi-step decision-making.

use_cases.name: Semantic Search
use_cases.description: Power semantic search that understands meaning, not keywords, across documents and e-commerce catalogs.

use_cases.name: Recommendation
use_cases.description: Enable hyper-personalized recommendations by capturing deep user intent and item similarity.

sustainability_impact.energy_saved: 5,400 GWh/Year — Enough to power San Francisco for an entire year
sustainability_impact.emissions_reduced: 2.7M Tons CO2/Year — Equivalent to taking 600,000 cars off the road
sustainability_impact.trees_equivalent: 128M Trees/Year — A forest the size of NYC planted every year
